name: service_estimate
description: Returns a price range for a requested service type, optionally adjusted for vehicle class. Lets the agent quote ball-park pricing without committing to a firm figure, reducing pre-booking drop-offs.
requires: New PB collection: pricing_rules (tenant_id, service_type, vehicle_class, price_min, price_max, notes)
Tenant must populate their pricing table — Ash can seed it from onboarding data
Optional: vehicle_class derived from rego_lookup result
el_call_timing: Invoke when caller asks 'how much does X cost' or 'what do you charge for Y'
notes: Pricing Rules is a planned dashboard feature. Until the UI exists, Ash seeds the table from a structured prompt during client onboarding. Price ranges (not exact) protect the workshop from being held to a phone quote. Agent must always add 'prices may vary depending on the condition of the vehicle' disclaimer.
